name: Dumbbell Upper / Lower 4-Day
description: Four days a week: two upper-body sessions, two lower-body. Heavier compound lifts, fewer accessories. Good middle ground between the 3-day full-body and the 6-day split.

1.name: Flat DB Press
1.description: Heavy. Lower under control, drive up.

1.name: Bent-Over Row
1.description: Flat back. Pull to the belly button.

1.name: DB Shoulder Press
1.description: Lock the elbows out at the top.

1.name: Single-Arm Row
1.description: One arm. Squeeze the shoulder blade.

2.name: Goblet Squats
2.description: DB at the chest. Heels down, hips back.

2.name: Romanian DL
2.description: Push hips back, soft knees, flat back.

2.name: Hip Thrusts
2.description: Shoulders on a bench, DB on the hips.

2.name: Calf Raises
2.description: DB in hand. Up on the toes.

2.name: Plank
2.description: 60 seconds. Body in a straight line.

4.name: DB Pullover
4.description: Lying back. DB arcs back over the head.

4.name: Lateral Raises
4.description: Slight elbow bend. Raise to shoulder height.

4.name: Rear Delt Flies
4.description: Bent over, open arms wide. Squeeze.

4.name: Hammer Curls
4.description: Neutral grip, like swinging a hammer.

4.name: Overhead Triceps
4.description: DB behind the head, elbows tucked in.

5.name: Single-Leg Bridge
5.description: One leg lifted. Drive the planted heel.

5.name: Step-ups
5.description: Step up onto a box/chair. Each leg.

5.name: Russian Twists
5.description: Seated, twist side to side. 20 total.

5.name: Leg Raises
5.description: Lying back. Raise legs under control.
